subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, wherein is that which draweth the world nigh unto the Most Great Name and causeth them to hearken unto the Call of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه ما یقرب العالم الی الاسم الاعظم و یسمعهم ندآء الله
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
